# Project structure generated by AI

```text
root/
├── public/              # Static assets (fonts, icons, images)
├── src/
│   ├── app/             # NEXT.JS ROUTING ONLY (Thin Layer)
│   │   ├── (auth)/      # Route groups for organization
│   │   ├── (dashboard)/
│   │   │   ├── layout.tsx
│   │   │   └── page.tsx
│   │   ├── api/         # Route handlers
│   │   ├── layout.tsx   # Root layout & providers
│   │   └── globals.css
│   ├── components/      # GLOBAL SHARED UI
│   │   ├── ui/          # Primitives (shadcn/ui, buttons, inputs)
│   │   ├── layout/      # Shared shells (Navbar, Footer)
│   │   └── shared/      # Common complex components (DataTables, Modals)
│   ├── features/        # BUSINESS DOMAINS (The Core)
│   │   ├── billing/     # Self-contained feature modules
│   │   │   ├── components/ # Feature-specific UI
│   │   │   ├── hooks/      # Logic specific to billing
│   │   │   ├── services/   # API calls / Server Actions
│   │   │   ├── types.ts    # Domain-specific types
│   │   │   └── index.ts    # Public API for the feature
│   │   └── auth/
│   ├── lib/             # CONFIGURATION & SDKS
│   │   ├── prisma.ts    # DB Clients
│   │   ├── stripe.ts    # Third-party SDKs
│   │   └── utils.ts     # Tailwind merge / small pure functions
│   ├── hooks/           # GLOBAL REUSABLE HOOKS (useMediaQuery, etc.)
│   ├── store/           # GLOBAL STATE (Zustand, Jotai)
│   └── types/           # GLOBAL TYPES / DTOs
├── .env
├── next.config.js
└── tsconfig.json
```
